metadata.pricing_note: Prices shown are per metre excl. VAT at standard single-order rate. WRP pricing is dynamic (volume discounts apply). Run scrape_wrp_prices.js to refresh all prices. Prices marked null need to be fetched.
metadata.image_note: Thumbnail images are 284px wide. Replace _284.jpg with _500.jpg for larger version. Profile drawing PDFs available per product page.
